calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Aug-01-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Elder and Dependent Adult Abuse OSC & TRO Hearing.
Dept. 204, Judge Peter J. Busch, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sherry Sawyer #5976, Bailiff Deputy Guitron.
Plaintiff Joe T. White present in pro per with Witness Jerome White.
Defednant Brenda White present in pro per.
Parties and Witness were placed under oath and direct examined.
Proof of Service is in the file.
The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, Plaintiff's request for issuance of a restraining order is GRANTED as follows: Defendant shall stay at least 100 yards away from the protected persons Joe T. White and Jerome White, and The Residence. Except that defendant may visit her mother.
Move-Out Order was imposed, defendant must take only own personal clothing and belongings.
Defendant shall not Harass, Attack, Strike, Threaten, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Follow, Stalk, Destroy Personal Property, Keep under Surveillance, or Block Movements, Contact (directly or indirectly), Telephone, Send Messages, Mail, e-Mail or by other electronic means.
Firearm restriction applies.
Expires in 3 years.
Order was submitted and signed in open court.
